programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: Two men meet in an endless frozen tundra and try to find their way out of it.

programme.title: Welcome to Iron Knob
programme.desc: After a boy accidentally shoots a stranger with his father's gun, the nonchalant townspeople help cover up the crime.

programme.title: Cabu Cabu 011
programme.desc: Mamadou is a young African man living in Turin and working illegally as a cabu-cabu, a kind of taxi driver used by the Black community.

programme.title: Love for Hire
programme.desc: A sociopathic millennial seeks the help of Greek God Cupid to seduce her crush, but things do not go as expected.

programme.title: Our Next Caller
programme.desc: A failing legal advice radio program gets a sudden boost in popularity when a mysterious caller offers a violent proposal.

programme.title: Leila's Blues
programme.desc: A mother of a child who was born with special needs is shocked to find out she is pregnant again. She decides to have an abortion without telling her husband.

programme.title: Cycling Shoes
programme.desc: Harold receives a new pair of cycling shoes for his birthday, but his bike is still damaged and he's saving all his money for a school trip with his crush.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: A young woman on the autism spectrum, Anna enjoys a life rigorously dictated by routine. When an individual unwittingly takes her seat on the morning bus, her day spins rapidly out of control.

programme.title: Adam's Day
programme.desc: Adam is a young boy from a difficult home environment who escapes to the fields to create a beautiful and fun world for himself.

programme.title: The Leak
programme.desc: Maria has always played the part of the caring mother and grandmother, which is what everyone expected from her. But then a simple question leads her to realise that she needs an authentic friendship.

programme.title: Out of Scene
programme.desc: As if by magic, Hopper's painting Automat comes to life and the viewer is transported to 1926 inside the painting, and its protagonist comes to life with all its history.

programme.title: The Silent Child
programme.desc: Busy parents Sue and Paul decide to get help from social worker, Joanne, to prepare their youngest daughter Libby, who is deaf, for the big step of going to school for the first time. Joanne and Libby bond almost immediately, with Joanne beginning to teach a responsive Libby British Sign Language.

programme.title: Until the Last Train
programme.desc: Two women and a social mandate; a train station that brings them back together. This time, they must face their desires and make a decision.

programme.title: Marusía
programme.desc: Two ordinary guys with nothing to lose because they might have already lost everything, they decide to run away heading nowhere. But sometimes running away is not the solution.

programme.title: The Firefly Girls
programme.desc: A father loses his daughter and now spends his time hiding in his house and drinking himself into a stupor. Meanwhile, a young girl from the neighbourhood is determined to sell the last of her Firefly Girl cookies.

programme.title: Scrap
programme.desc: Geert Van Steenkiste, The Photo Radar Marathon Man, loves his old car, a Nissan Micra, so much that he can't let go of it. When a repo man comes to collect his car, he takes things a little further.

programme.title: Mr. H
programme.desc: A delirious audience, the wonder in the spectators eyes, a man's manifience, a whole world expectations enclosed in two hours. Ladies and gentlement: Mr. H, alias Henry Houdini.

programme.desc: When a single mother learns about a terrorist attack in London, she desperately tries to contact her son, who lives and studies in the British Capital.

programme.desc: God upholds there still are honest men in the world. The Devil disagrees. Thus, bet for ten thousand souls takes place between the two on the high moral principles of Mr. Radu Iovan.

programme.title: My Husband
programme.desc: Maria is a housewife married to Diego, a soccer fanatic. Maria realises that she is uncomfortable with her marriage and contemplates change, but Diego is oblivious to any problems in their marriage.

programme.title: Time Freak
programme.desc: A neurotic inventor builds a time machine; however, he ends up getting lost while time-travelling to the day before.

programme.title: Hold On
programme.desc: Window cleaner Dennis falls from the 40th floor of a high rise and gets stuck outside the window of Debbie, who is getting ready for a date. The two have an awkward conversation through the soundproof glass.

programme.title: Ave Eva
programme.desc: Eva is a seven-year-old girl who accidentally sees her parents making love. This spectacle, unbearably mysterious and violent, causes fear and curiosity at the same time.

programme.desc: Billy is a nice little boy, who likes to explore the world around him. He likes stories and animal and he might be the perfect boy for you.

programme.title: You'll Only Have Each Other
programme.desc: After the death of her mother, a disconnected daughter must face the strange and horrible manifestations of her guilt.

programme.title: The Voorman Problem
programme.desc: Doctor Williams is called in to examine the enigmatic Mr Voorman, a prisoner with a peculiar affliction: he believes he is a god. The Doctor must decide on the sanity of Mr Voorman.

programme.title: The Youth in Us
programme.desc: A young couple confronts a painful future by looking to the past.

programme.title: Deathless
programme.desc: British private investigator John Ray tracks Max Serloom, who has kidnapped John's wife, and only one of them will live through their confrontation in a deserted warehouse in London.

programme.title: Henrietta Bulkowski
programme.desc: A determined young woman, crippled with a severe hunchback, will stop at nothing to fulfill her dream of seeing the world. This is the story of how she finds happiness.

programme.title: Tomorrow Island
programme.desc: In the dawn of the Cold War, a young Soviet telegraphist makes a desperate attempt to save her American lover from being stranded in the Russian side of the Bering Strait after receiving a border closure message.

programme.desc: A Green Bird lays its first egg. It's going to try everything to make it hatch.

programme.desc: A car drives through the snow. Behind the wheel is Nelly. She is thirteen years old. Nelly wants to go home. Separating her from her goal are three questions, two keys, a diving tower and a racing heart.
